message:
fix: enable dashboard selection on mobile sidebar (Safari) (#9776)

Fixes #9758

Two issues prevented taps on sidebar nav links from registering on
mobile Safari:

1. Nav items had draggable=true on mobile. Safari interprets touch
   events on draggable elements as potential drag gestures, swallowing
   the tap before the NavLink click handler fires. Drag-reorder is now
   disabled on mobile viewports.

2. Missing touch-action: manipulation on the mobile sidebar panel.
   Without it Safari applies a 300ms tap delay and double-tap-to-zoom
   detection, adding latency that can cause missed taps. The
   touch-manipulation utility removes both.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
